name: Lydia (Cooking Vore)
description:
CW: Cooking Vore, Dub/Non-Con, Hard Vore, Digestion/Disposal

Prey Pov

Years ago, you swore off all contact with society and decided to go out and live in the woods alone. One day, an odd, pale woman shows up at your door. I wonder what she wants from you?

Despite my little blurb, you know exactly what she wants from the title, she's very dominant and touchy so she handles and inspects her "meat" very closely.

She's super up front with her goal, so just proceed knowing she already wants to eat {{user}}.

I recommend making up whatever reason {{user}} left to live in the woods and what they do out there. It doesn't matter too much, she's eating you either way.

Sorta inspired by this.

Lydia after eating a hearty {{user}} roast.

If you didnt enjoy the bot, please inform me of how you splashed her with water and she burst into flames.
